source_jobs.title: Quant Researcher
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Quantitative Researcher to fit into our existing highly-skilled NY-based quantitative team. As a part of our Quant team you’ll be studying the crypto market to find profitable trading opportunities and build automated trading strategies. The ideal candidate would be someone who has experience working with low-latency execution engines, handling real-time market data, and producing strategies that react immediately to market changes. If this sounds like you and you enjoy working in fast paced environments, this role is for you!




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Analyze market microstructure and on-chain data to identify inefficiencies and trading opportunities.

 - Apply statistical and machine-learning techniques to generate, validate, and improve trading signals.

 - Design and implement market-making, arbitrage, and systematic strategies end-to-end.

 - Build and maintain signal-generation pipelines, feature stores, and parameter-optimization tooling.

 - Develop robust backtesting frameworks; conduct performance analysis and attribution.

 - Implement trading system components, including order management and exchange connectivity.

 - Build and operate data pipelines and research platforms for high-quality, reproducible research.

 - Ensure system reliability, scalability, and latency/performance optimization in production.

 - Implement risk monitoring and control systems across strategies and venues.

 - Run post-trade analytics to evaluate execution quality, slippage, and market impact.

 - Develop risk metrics, dashboards, and reporting tools for strategy and portfolio oversight.

 - Run simulations and estimate market impact for both liquid and illiquid assets.




WHO YOU ARE:

 - M.S. or Ph.D. in Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.

 - 3–5 years of quantitative research/analysis or development experience.

 - Experience in HFT development.

 - Strong foundation in probability, statistics, time-series modeling, and quantitative methods.

 - Expert-level Python for research and production; proficiency in C++ or Rust for performance-critical components.

 - Solid grasp of data structures, algorithms, software engineering principles, and version control.

 - Experience with statistical analysis, backtesting methodologies, and strategy development.

 - Ability to create and use algorithms to investigate large datasets and resolve data/logic errors with rigor.

 - Understanding of financial markets, trading concepts, and risk-management principles.

 - Ideally based in New York or willing to relocate.




PREFERRED:

 - Experience with machine-learning frameworks and distributed/parallel computing.

 - Familiarity with Linux development environments and modern DevOps practices.

 - Understanding of cryptocurrency markets, DeFi protocols, and on-chain analytics.

 - Experience with real-time trading systems, low-latency applications, and exchange integrations.

 - Knowledge of blockchain technology, smart-contract fundamentals, and MEV-aware strategies.

 - Professional certifications (e.g., CFA,

source_jobs.title: General Opening — Create Your Own Role!
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

New York, US Remote, or Global Remote



We’re always excited to connect with exceptionally talented people who are passionate about crypto and believe they can contribute to the future of Injective.



This is a general application for candidates who may not see an open role that perfectly matches their background, but feel strongly aligned with our mission, culture, and pace.



We’re open to different profiles, whether your background is in engineering, product, operations, research, people, or something else entirely, we’d love to hear how you think you could contribute.



Injective Labs is a great fit for people who:

 - Thrive in fast-paced environments

 - Enjoy high ownership and autonomy

 - Are comfortable operating in highly technical teams

 - Adapt quickly as priorities evolve

 - Proactively identify problems and drive solutions forward

 - Have strong communication and cross-functional collaboration skills

 - Are genuinely passionate about crypto, DeFi, and emerging technologies



If that sounds like you, we encourage you to create your own role and tell us where you think you can make the biggest impact.



As an equal opportunity employer we don’t tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind. Whether that’s based on race, ethnicity, age, gender identity, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, disability, pregnancy, veteran status or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state or local laws.



We will only contact candidates using emails from the @injectivelabs.org http://injectivelabs.org domain. If you are approached by any other account or domain regarding this position, it was not sent by us. Please stay cautious and report any suspicious communication.

source_jobs.title: Front-End Developer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a talented Front-End Developer with a strong background in Vue.js and a passion for blockchain technology. As a member of our engineering team, you will contribute to the development of cutting-edge decentralized applications (dApps) that are redefining the future of finance.



As a Front-End Developer, you will work closely with back-end engineers and designers to build intuitive, high-performance user experiences. This role is for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, likes working with high ownership, and can operate effectively in highly technical environments. Most importantly, this role is for someone genuinely passionate about DeFi.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Develop user-facing features and interfaces using Vue.js 3

 - Collaborate closely with back-end engineers and designers to implement intuitive, scalable, and elegant solutions

 - Optimize applications for performance, responsiveness, and scalability

 - Implement and maintain unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and reliability

 - Contribute to the development and maintenance of reusable components and front-end architecture

 - Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices

 - Stay up to date with industry trends and best practices in blockchain, Web3, and front-end development




WHO YOU ARE:

 - 3+ years of professional experience in front-end development

 - Strong proficiency in Vue.js and its core principles

 - Strong understanding of JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3

 - Experience with the Vue ecosystem, including Nuxt.js and Tailwind CSS

 - Familiarity with REST and gRPC APIs

 - Experience implementing and maintaining front-end testing frameworks

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail

 - At least 1 year of experience in blockchain, Web3, or crypto

 - Familiarity with the Cosmos ecosystem is a strong plus

 - Experience integrating crypto wallets and interacting with blockchain-based applications is a plus

 - Must be fluent in English

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills

 - Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment




WHY WORK WITH US?

 - Competitive salary and INJ token award

 - Remote-friendly work environment with flexible hours

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Equipment

 - Home Office Stipend

 - Opportunity to work on cutting-edge blockchain technology in the finance industry

 - Collaborative team culture with opportunities for professional growth and development

 - Global team meet ups



As an equal opportunity employer we don’t tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind. Whether that’s based on race, ethnicity, age, gender identity, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, disability, pregnancy, veteran status or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state or local laws.

source_jobs.title: Senior Technical Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Full-time Position – Hybrid or Remote – Ideally NY.



We’re looking for a Senior Technical Product Manager to help shape and scale products across the Injective ecosystem. You will work closely with engineering, design, and leadership teams across multiple initiatives, helping drive product direction, prioritization, and execution from ideation through launch and iteration.



We’re open to different backgrounds for this role. You may come from a strong crypto-native background with deep understanding of exchanges, DeFi, or financial systems, or from a leading technology company with experience building and scaling high-quality technical products. What matters most is strong product thinking, execution, communication, and genuine curiosity about the future of crypto and finance.




WHO IS THIS ROLE FOR?

This role is for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, has strong product fundamentals, likes working with high ownership, and can operate effectively in highly technical environments. Most importantly, this role is for someone genuinely passionate about DeFi. Someone who can quickly understand context, challenge the status quo, and constantly push the bar to deliver better products and user experiences.



If you consider yourself someone who knows how to take ownership, lead initiatives end-to-end, and at the same time roll up your sleeves and operate as an IC, this role is for you.



If you’re looking for highly structured processes, clearly defined playbooks, or a comfort-zone environment, this role is probably not for you. We move fast, priorities evolve quickly, and we value people who are proactive, adaptable, and drive solutions forward.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Drive product development across multiple initiatives, from new products and feature ideation through launch, iteration, growth, and continuous improvement

 - Contribute to product strategy and roadmap planning aligned with company objectives

 - Partner closely with engineering, design, and leadership teams to define product direction and priorities

 - Own prioritization decisions using user feedback, product intuition, data, and business context

 - Translate complex technical concepts and user needs into clear product requirements and execution plans

 - Maintain a strong product quality bar across user experience, functionality, and execution

 - Define and monitor key product metrics and use insights to improve decision-making

 - Work cross-functionally with teams across engineering, growth, BD, operations, and support

 - Operate effectively in a fast-paced environment with evolving priorities and high ownership expectations

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - 7+ years of experience in Product Management, preferably working on technical or infrastructure-heavy products

 - Strong product fundamentals and proven product judgment

 - Strong technical understanding and experience working closely with highly technical teams, with a solid understanding of finance

 - High ownership mentality with the ability to independently drive initiatives forward

 - Comfortable operating in ambiguity a

source_jobs.title: Protocol Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for an accomplished Protocol Engineer who is able to fit into an existing highly-skilled global dev team. Your role is to work closely with the protocol team to brainstorm, write specs, implement and test chain features for our Injective DeFi modules. You also have the freedom to detect and take ownership to improve chain performance and scalability via kvstore optimization, processing logic and order matching engine




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Build, maintain and test core components on our Cosmos-SDK protocol including our decentralized orderbook, trade execution coordinator, order matcher, and Layer-2 execution environment

 - Develop and optimize core components of the Injective blockchain (consensus, state management, financial infrastructure and applications)

 - Write open-source Golang clients that allow users to interact directly with our protocol and smart contracts

 - Contribute to the research and development of new blockchain features and technologies

 - Work closely with cross-functional teams, including front-end developers, back-end developers, and quality assurance engineers, to deliver comprehensive blockchain solutions

 - Collaborate with external partners and open-source communities to enhance our blockchain ecosystem

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Minimum of 3 years’ experience as a Blockchain Engineer

 - Prior experience working in trading or in an exchange

 - Worked on at least two production Golang codebases that are reasonably large and performant

 - Strong knowledge of Go idioms, libraries and parallel processing

 - Strong knowledge of blockchain, DeFi & DEX concepts, consensus mechanisms, CosmWasm contract platform

 - Strong knowledge of CS fundamentals such as data structures and API design

 - Ability to communicate technical concepts with other technical and non-technical team members




NICE TO HAVES:

 - Experience with Cosmos-SDK/Tendermint

 - Experience with cryptography libraries including digital signature, hash algorithms used by Ethereum, Cosmos

 - Experience with key-value databases especially ones used by cosmos-sdk

 - Experience with Ethereum/Solidity (bonus points if you've worked with Layer-2 before!)

 - Knowledge of financial instruments and markets




WHY WORK WITH US?

 - Competitive salary and INJ token award

 - Remote-friendly work environment with flexible hours.

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Equipment

 - Home Office Stipend

 - Opportunity to work on cutting-edge blockchain technology in the finance industry.

 - Collaborative team culture with opportunities for professional growth and development.

 - Global team meet ups.



As an equal opportunity employer we don’t tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind. Whether that’s based on race, ethnicity, age, gender identity, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, disability, pregnancy, veteran status or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state or local laws.



We will only contact candidates using emails from the @injectivelabs.org http://injectivelabs.org domain. If you are approached by any other account or domain

source_jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the People Ops team team, you will play a key role in helping grow the Injective Labs team. You will own the full-cycle recruitment process, from understanding hiring needs, and identifying top talent to managing candidate pipelines and supporting onboarding efforts.

Beyond recruiting, we are looking for someone who is always thinking about how to improve processes, elevate the candidate experience, and contribute to broader People Operations initiatives. This is an opportunity to have a meaningful impact on a fast-growing organization by helping attract and retain exceptional talent.




WHO IS THIS ROLE FOR?

This role is for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, is comfortable engaging with highly technical professionals, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys working with a high degree of ownership. If you are passionate about building teams, know how to take ownership, lead initiatives end-to-end, and are willing to roll up your sleeves to get things done, this role is for you.

If you’re looking for highly structured processes, clearly defined playbooks, or a comfort-zone environment, this role is probably not for you. We move fast, priorities evolve quickly, and we value people who are proactive, adaptable, and drive solutions forward.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Manage the full-cycle recruitment process for both technical and non-technical roles, from job posting through offer stage.

 - Partner closely with hiring managers to understand hiring needs, role requirements, and team priorities.

 - Source and attract high-quality candidates through LinkedIn, referrals, job boards, networking, and other channels.

 - Screen resumes and conduct initial candidate interviews in fluent English.

 - Coordinate interview processes between candidates and internal stakeholders.

 - Maintain clear communication with candidates throughout the hiring process.

 - Track recruitment metrics and maintain candidate records in the ATS.

 - Stay up to date on recruiting trends, talent market conditions, and best practices.

 - Promote Injective Labs culture, values, and contribute new approaches, policies, and procedures to support continuous improvement.

 - Identify and implement new strategies and programs to attract applicants and develop creative solutions for specific acquisition challenges.

 - Participate in company-wide People Ops initiatives and projects as needed.

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - 3-5 years of full-cycle recruiting experience within the crypto, blockchain, or Web3 industry.

 - Experience managing the end-to-end recruitment cycle, from role briefing and sourcing through to the offer in a startup environment.

 - Experience recruiting across global markets (US, Europe, Asia or Latam) and comfortable working in distributed teams.

 - Demonstrated ability to recruit for highly technical roles, as well as for non-technical positions

 - Strong sourcing, interviewing, and candidate assessment skills

 - Knowledge of the crypto, blockchain, and DeFi ecosystem

 - Experience using ATS systems (Ashby preferably)

 - Must be fluent in Engl

source_jobs.title: Growth Engineer / Integration Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Growth / Integrations Engineer, you will play a pivotal role in growing the Injective Ecosystem by facilitating partner integrations. We’re seeking for someone highly technical who can work cross-functionally with our product, engineering, and business development teams, as well as external technical partners.

You will be responsible for building components that connect the Injective ecosystem with the broader blockchain landscape and for leading integrations through various environments all the way to production. Success in this role means ensuring integrations are delivered efficiently while maintaining high technical, security, and reliability standards.




WHO IS THIS ROLE FOR?

This role is for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, feels comfortable in highly technical environments, has excellent communications skills, and likes working with high ownership. Most importantly, this role is for someone genuinely passionate about making things work, sharing knowledge, solving problems collaboratively, and continuously learning.

If you consider yourself someone who knows how to take ownership, lead initiatives end-to-end, and at the same time roll up your sleeves and operate as an IC, this role is for you.

If you’re looking for highly structured processes, clearly defined playbooks, or a comfort-zone environment, this role is probably not for you. We move fast, priorities evolve quickly, and we value people who are proactive, adaptable, and drive solutions forward.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Build components that integrate the Injective blockchain with JSON-RPC providers, indexers, wallets, bridges, storage solutions, analytics platforms, and applications

 - Own partner integrations end-to-end, from technical discovery and architecture discussions through testing, deployment, and production support

 - Leverage the existing integration experience to build systems that are intuitive, scalable and highly performant

 - Continuously improve integration tooling and processes, including deployment workflows, testing frameworks, deployment scripts, security controls, monitoring, and alerting

 - Provide prompt and effective technical support to developers by troubleshooting issues, answering technical queries, and assisting with integration challenges

 - Update and maintain our technical documentation

 - Create and deliver comprehensive tutorials, sample code, and other developer resources

 - Collaborate with product and engineering teams to gather developer feedback, identify areas for improvement, and influence product roadmap decisions

 - Support developer onboarding initiatives to ensure a seamless experience for teams building within the Injective ecosystem




QUALIFICATIONS:

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent related technical experience

 - Experience working within the blockchain ecosystem, including Layer 1s, Layer 2s, or infrastructure providers such as oracles, bridges, indexers, RPC providers, wallets, or other high-performance blockchain applications

 - Strong expertise in smart contract development, blo

source_jobs.title: Paralegal
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal to join our legal team in the dynamic field of blockchain technology. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of the legal principles applicable to blockchains and decentralized finance, as well as the ability to support the legal team in various aspects of regulatory compliance, contracts, and research.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Collaborate with legal team members to ensure adherence to relevant laws and regulations.

 - Draft, review, and manage contracts, agreements, and legal documents related to the company' operations.

 - Support the legal team in negotiating and finalizing contracts with external parties, ensuring compliance and accuracy.

 - Conduct research and stay updated on regulatory frameworks and compliance requirements.

 - Work closely with internal teams, providing legal guidance and support in day-to-day operations.

 - Conduct and manage Know Your Customer (“KYC”) processes, with strong preference for a candidate with experience using Synaps or similar platforms.

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Bachelor's degree. A paralegal certificate is a plus

 - Minimum of 2-3 years of experience working as a paralegal in a law firm or in-house legal department, preferably with exposure to legal work related to decentralized finance and blockchains

 - Strong general understanding of legal principles, contracts, and regulatory compliance

 - Familiarity with the legal considerations arising from blockchain technology and smart contracts, as well as a general understanding the technology

 - Proficiency with compliance platforms

 - Detail-oriented and capable of handling multiple tasks with precision

 - Ability to adapt quickly to the evolving regulatory landscape in the decentralized finance and blockchain industry.

 - Willingness to continuously learn and stay updated on changes in laws and regulations affecting the industry

 - Uphold high ethical standards and confidentiality in handling sensitive legal matters




WHY WORK WITH US?

 - Competitive salary and INJ token award

 - Remote-friendly work environment with flexible hours.

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Equipment

 - Home Office Stipend

 - Opportunity to work on cutting-edge blockchain technology in the finance industry.

 - Collaborative team culture with opportunities for professional growth and development.

 - Global team meet ups.



As an equal opportunity employer we don’t tolerate discrimination or harassment of any kind. Whether that’s based on race, ethnicity, age, gender identity, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, disability, pregnancy, veteran status or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state or local laws.



We will only contact candidates using emails from the @injectivelabs.org http://injectivelabs.org domain. If you are approached by any other account or domain regarding this position, it was not sent by us. Please stay cautious and report any suspicious communication.

source_jobs.title: QA Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a versatile Quality Engineer to help deliver reliable, high-quality experiences across a growing portfolio of Web3 products and blockchain innovations.

In this role, your primary focus will be testing frontend dApps and building UI automation testing suite to ensure seamless, reliable user experiences and quality control. You’ll work closely with engineering and product teams to validate web applications, mobile experiences, blockchain integrations, APIs, trading systems, and internal tooling.

This role goes beyond traditional testing. We’re looking for someone who enjoys learning new technologies, solving complex problems, and taking ownership in a fast-moving environment. The ideal candidate is comfortable performing hands-on manual testing, designing and maintaining automated UI test suites, investigating technical issues, and collaborating with engineering and product teams to improve product quality.

Success in this role requires versatility. If you enjoy learning new systems, wearing multiple hats, and tackling a variety of technical challenges across frontend, Web3, and automation workflows, you’ll thrive here.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Perform manual, exploratory, regression, integration, and end-to-end testing across multiple products and systems.

 - Design, build, and maintain a UI automation test suite and quality tooling using Typescript and Playwright. Integrate wallet extensions such as MetaMask/Keplr into the test suite.

 - Validate functionality across web applications, APIs, backend services, blockchain infrastructure, and protocol-level features.

 - Investigate issues across frontend, backend, infrastructure, and distributed systems.

 - Analyze logs, metrics, network traffic, and system behavior to identify root causes and quality risks.

 - Collaborate with Product, Engineering, DevOps, and other stakeholders throughout the development lifecycle.

 - Contribute to release validation, test strategy, automation initiatives, and continuous improvement efforts.

 - Leverage AI-powered tools and workflows to accelerate testing, automation, investigation, and overall quality engineering productivity.

 - Support new products, features, and initiatives as business priorities evolve.

 - Assist with production investigations, incident analysis, and post-release validation when needed.

 - Proactively identify quality gaps, process inefficiencies, and opportunities to improve product reliability and testing coverage.
   
   


WHO YOU ARE:

 - 4-5 years of experience as a QA Engineer

 - Experience testing frontend Web3 applications, dApps, wallets, smart contract integrations, or other user-facing blockchain experiences.

 - Experience testing frontend trading platforms, decentralized exchanges, financial dashboards, or other complex distributed applications with user-critical workflows.

 - Experience with both manual testing and test automation.

 - Proficiency in Typescript and experience developing or maintaining automation frameworks such as Playwright and internal tooling.

 - Experience with Playwright, Pytest, CI/CD

source_jobs.title: Mobile App Developer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INJECTIVE LABS

Injective Labs is trailblazing a new dawn for Web3 enabled finance. We are the core contributors to Injective, one of the fastest growing blockchains in the industry.

Injective provides an interoperable smart contracts platform that is optimized for building decentralized finance applications. Interoperability is at the core of Injective, which is natively integrated with chains such as Ethereum, Cosmos and Solana. Developers can rapidly launch premier financial applications suited for mass adoption using Injective’s infrastructure and specialized DeFi primitives such as the world’s first fully on-chain order book.

Our team has decades of experience spearheading the largest financial institutions and tech organizations. Injective is incubated by Binance and is backed by leading firms such as Jump Crypto, Pantera and Mark Cuban.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the Mobile team, you will work on building the next generation of DeFi trading applications. You'll primarily work on our React Native mobile app, collaborating closely with Product, Design, and Backend Engineering teams to deliver a fast, reliable, and intuitive trading experience.

This role is ideal for a junior to mid-level engineer with strong React and TypeScript fundamentals who enjoys building high-quality mobile products. We're looking for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, takes ownership of their work, and enjoys solving real-world problems. Most importantly, this role is for someone genuinely passionate about building exceptional user experiences and excited by the future of decentralized finance.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Develop, maintain, and improve features for our React Native mobile application.

 - Collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Backend Engineering teams to deliver high-quality user experiences.

 - Build scalable, maintainable, and well-tested mobile applications using React Native and TypeScript.

 - Integrate mobile applications with backend APIs and services.

 - Optimize application performance, responsiveness, and reliability across both iOS and Android platforms.

 - Monitor and triage issues reported through Linear, investigate bugs, and work closely with the team to prioritize and resolve them in a timely manner.

 - Take ownership of reported issues by troubleshooting root causes and delivering reliable fixes to ensure a stable, high-quality mobile experience.

 - Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices.

 - Stay up to date with modern mobile development practices and emerging technologies.

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - 2–5 years of professional software engineering experience.

 - Strong React and TypeScript fundamentals.

 - Professional experience developing mobile applications with React Native.

 - Solid understanding of iOS and Android platforms, including their differences and mobile development best practices.

 - Experience integrating applications with backend APIs.

 - Experience with Node.js.

 - Experience working with REST APIs.

 - Experience with gRPC and/or Server-Sent Events (SSE) is a strong plus.

 - Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals and clean code principles.

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

 - Must be fluent in English.

 - Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience building fintech, trading, or cryptocurrency applications.

 - Familiarity with blockchain, Web3, or DeFi technologies.

 - Experience publishing applications to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

 - Experience optimizing mobile application performance and debugging production issues.
   


WHY WORK WITH US?

 - Competitive salary and INJ token award

 - Remote-friendly work environment with flexible hours.

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Equipment

 - Home Office Stipend

 - Opportunity to work on cutting-edge blockchain technology in the finance industry

notes: Highly technical roles, blockchain focus, rapid hiring pace
